description: Pre-construction checklist — Chad's master template, 44 items across 10 categories. Items here MUST close before Sitework can begin. Every other phase's checklist is structurally derived from this one's pattern (categories may differ per phase).

items.label: Construction contract signed by client and Palmetto
Initial deposit received and deposited
Scope of work attached and initialed by both parties
Change-order policy reviewed with client (CO process, $ thresholds, sign-off authority)
Insurance certificates exchanged (Palmetto's GL + WC; client's builder's risk)
Architectural plans final, stamped, dated
Structural engineering complete and stamped
Foundation engineering complete (footings, slab, anchor schedule)
MEP design complete (plumbing, HVAC, electrical layouts)
Plans uploaded to Drive and shared with subs
Kitchen cabinet selections finalized (cabinet line, door style, finish)
Countertop selections finalized (material, edge, color)
Flooring selections finalized (tile, hardwood by zone)
Plumbing fixture selections finalized (faucets, toilets, tubs, showers)
Lighting fixture selections finalized (interior, exterior, fans)
Exterior selections finalized (siding, roofing, trim, paint)
Interior paint colors selected per room
Hardware selections finalized (door, cabinet, bath)
Building permit submitted to Baldwin County
Septic / sewer permit submitted
Electrical permit submitted
Plumbing permit submitted
Site survey complete and on file
Soil compaction / percolation test complete
House layout staked on lot, verified by client
Utility locates called in and marked
Framing crew confirmed and scheduled
MEP subs confirmed (plumber, HVAC, electrician)
Drywall sub confirmed
Painting sub confirmed
Trim carpenter confirmed
Lumber package quoted and ordered
Windows ordered (drop-dead per lead time, typically 10–12 wk)
Exterior doors ordered
Roofing materials ordered
Contingency line item set in Cost Tracker (typically 5–10%)
Allowance schedule reviewed with client and signed
Payment schedule (draws) agreed with client and lender
Target completion date set and shared with client
Framing start date locked (anchors backwards-schedule)
Pre-construction kickoff with client (review scope, schedule, communication cadence)
Pre-construction kickoff with subs (site walk, schedule sync, expectations)
